testcase.name: tests.test_certificate_generator
testcase.error: tests/test_certificate_generator.py:8: in <module> from pynubank.utils.certificate_generator import CertificateGenerator pynubank/utils/certificate_generator.py:11: in <module> class CertificateGenerator: pynubank/utils/certificate_generator.py:13: in CertificateGenerator def __init__(self, login, password, device_id, encrypted_code=None, http_client: Optional[HttpClient] = None): ^^^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'HttpClient' is not defined

testcase.name: tests.test_cli
testcase.error: tests/test_cli.py:9: in <module> from pynubank.utils.certificate_generator import CertificateGenerator pynubank/utils/certificate_generator.py:11: in <module> class CertificateGenerator: pynubank/utils/certificate_generator.py:13: in CertificateGenerator def __init__(self, login, password, device_id, encrypted_code=None, http_client: Optional[HttpClient] = None): ^^^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'HttpClient' is not defined
